---
title: my first git repo
author: Andrew Yoon
output: github_document
---

#  My first commit

Here is some text that constitutes my first commit in my first repo. 
Now I am adding a new line to this first commit section of the readme
Text for another commit

# My second commit

Here is more text that will be added in my second commit

# My third commit

Here is some final text for my third commit.
